name: large-clip-vault
title: Large Clip Vault
description: Vault for clipboard text larger than Raycast's 32,768-char clipboard history cap.
author: teeranade_cheng

commands.name: watch-clipboard
commands.title: Watch Clipboard
commands.description: Background watcher that vaults clips larger than Raycast's clipboard history cap.

commands.name: save-clipboard
commands.title: Save Current Clipboard
commands.description: Manually save the current clipboard contents to the vault, regardless of size.

commands.name: search-vault
commands.title: Search Vault
commands.description: Search, copy, paste, and delete saved large clips.

preferences.name: maxEntries
preferences.title: Max Entries
preferences.description: Maximum number of clips to keep. Older clips are evicted when over the limit.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
